sentences.arabic: الطِّبُّ الشَّعْبِيُّ الْعَرَبِيُّ يَعْتَمِدُ عَلَى الْأَعْشَابِ وَالنَّبَاتَاتِ لِعِلَاجِ الْأَمْرَاضِ.
sentences.translation: Arapska narodna medicina oslanja se na bilje i biljke za liječenje bolesti.
sentences.translationEn: Arab folk medicine relies on herbs and plants to treat illnesses.

sentences.arabic: يَعْرِفُ النَّاسُ فِي الرِّيفِ كَيْفَ يَسْتَخْدِمُونَ نَبَاتَاتٍ مِثْلَ الثُّومِ وَالزَّنْجَبِيلِ وَالنَّعْنَاعِ.
sentences.translation: Ljudi na selu znaju kako koristiti biljke poput bijelog luka, đumbira i metvice.
sentences.translationEn: People in rural areas know how to use plants such as garlic, ginger, and mint.

sentences.arabic: يَشْرَبُ الْمَرِيضُ شَايَ الْأَعْشَابِ وَيَضَعُ الضِّمَادَاتِ الطَّبِيعِيَّةَ عَلَى جُرُوحِهِ.
sentences.translation: Bolesnik pije biljni čaj i stavlja prirodne obloge na rane.
sentences.translationEn: The patient drinks herbal tea and applies natural compresses to wounds.

sentences.arabic: هَذِهِ الْمَعْرِفَةُ تَنْتَقِلُ مِنَ الْجَدَّاتِ إِلَى الْبَنَاتِ عَبْرَ مَئَاتِ السِّنِينَ.
sentences.translation: Ovo znanje prenosi se s baka na kćerke već stotinama godina.
sentences.translationEn: This knowledge has been passed from grandmothers to daughters for hundreds of years.
